underlying_goal: Improve a neural search service by adding query sanitization, gender/price/brand filtering, and making the bootstrap CLI non-destructive by default
friction_detail: Claude over-engineered the brand detection by injecting a DB model and loading brands at runtime, when user wanted a simple hardcoded list; also initially used filter instead of should for brand/price, requiring correction.
brief_summary: User iteratively improved a neural search service with gender/price/brand filtering and query sanitization; most features were delivered but Claude over-complicated the brand feature requiring a redo and the session ended with an unresolved lint/import issue.
